title: Device Settings  - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Custom Button UI shows Microsoft Teams option selected by default even when Teams is not detected on Falcon headsets
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap Device Settings for a connected Falcon headset
Locate the Custom Button configuration section
Observe the two options displayed: "Microsoft Teams" (selected by default) and "Other Providers"
Observe the modal that appears stating Teams is not connected and advising to select Other Providers
Observe the list of additional actions revealed: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing
expected: When Microsoft Teams is not detected, the Custom Button UI shows two options: \"Microsoft Teams\" (selected by default) and \"Other Providers\". Selecting \"Microsoft Teams\" displays a modal stating Teams is not connected and advises selecting Other Providers. Selecting \"Other Providers\" reveals additional actions: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing.
